findings.summary: en.ts has 963 flat key-value pairs as source of truth
zh.ts has 874 keys (89 missing), uk.ts 861 (102 missing), 6 locales have 857 keys (106 missing), 9 locales have 848 keys (115 missing)
Library v2.2.1 provides flatten(), translator(), resolveTemplate() for {{key}} interpolation. No CLDR pluralization support built-in.
Uses i18n.flatten on merged app+ui dicts, i18n.translator with i18n.resolveTemplate for {{param}} templates
setTitlebar/updateTitlebar only applies to win32. Linux uses system frame. createMainWindow only handles darwin and win32 frame options.
dialog.showMessageBox in wireWindowRecovery uses hardcoded English strings like 'Relaunch', 'Export Logs', 'Quit', 'Keep Waiting'. Error messages are also hardcoded English.
TitlebarTheme already defined. ElectronAPI type shows IPC channels. get/set pattern used for preferences.
